scripts.build: yarn clean && cross-env NODE_ENV=production rspack build && cp ./web-build/index.html ./web-build/404.html && bash ./postbuild.sh
scripts.build:webpack: yarn clean && cross-env NODE_ENV=production webpack build -c ./webpack.config.kill-switch.js && cp ./web-build/index.html ./web-build/404.html && bash ./postbuild.sh
